title: 151 Hemming Tape 2 x 10 metres rolls, iron on
features: NO SEWING: Sewing Box Hemming Tape, the easiest and the neatest way to join hem fabrics. Quick and easy solution to hemming garments and bonding fabrics. Perfect for school uniforms, skirts, dresses, trousers, or applying fabric badges to caps, jackets or other garments. Non woven adhesive fabric tape

EASY TO USE, MEASURE, CUT & IRON: Sewing Box Hemming Tape can be used with a standard domestic iron and ironing cloth. Simply measure the web, cut, place on the fabric and fold fabric over to cover the tape, place the ironing cloth over the top and iron gently and carefully to secure the hem. Always use an iron temperature as per garment care label
HEMS AROUND THE HOME!: Sewing Box Hemming Tape, perfect to use to make alterations to curtain lengths, easily measure cut an hem to required length
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Sewing Box Non woven adhesive fabric tape
description: Product Description Sewing Box Hemming Tape, the easiest and the neatest way to join hem fabrics. Quick and easy solution to hemming garments and bonding fabrics.
